round2: Round 2 is in the books, and outside of Marc accidentally nailing OTT in 6, it seems the rest of you were actively trying to get zero points. Seriously, Dad and Stephanie, not a single correct series pick? Impressive in its futility.
round3: Anaheim put Minnesota out of their misery in four, and New Jersey finally put Ottawa down in seven. Marc and Mom apparently missed both memos, while everyone else got at least one winner right, even if no one nailed the games.
round4: Well, that was a disaster. Every single one of you picked Anaheim, and every single one of you was wrong. The Devils took it in 7 games, leaving your collective predictions looking about as useful as a goalie with no pads.
